# Test Automation Summary

**Date**: 2026-03-09
**Generated by**: Quinn QA (BMAD)
**Project**: youtube.pipeline (yt.pipe)
**Framework**: Go `testing` + `testify v1.11.1`
**Runner**: `go test ./...`

## Generated Tests (This Session)

### API Tests (internal/api/)

- [x] `scenes_test.go` — Scene approval workflow API (17 tests)
  - GET /api/v1/projects/{id}/scenes — success, project not found
  - POST /api/v1/projects/{id}/scenes/{num}/approve — success, invalid scene number, invalid asset type, missing type, project not found, scene not found, invalid transition, TTS asset type
  - POST /api/v1/projects/{id}/scenes/{num}/reject — success, invalid scene number, invalid asset type, scene not found, invalid transition, already approved
  - Full workflow: reject → regenerate → approve cycle

- [x] `response_test.go` — Response helper unit tests (5 tests)
  - WriteJSON: success response, nil data, custom status code
  - WriteError: error response structure, internal server error
  - GetRequestID: empty context returns empty string

### Store Tests (internal/store/)

- [x] `execution_log_test.go` — ExecutionLog CRUD operations (8 tests)
  - CreateExecutionLog: with job ID, without optional fields
  - ListExecutionLogsByProject: empty, filters by project, preserves job ID, handles null job ID
  - ListAllExecutionLogs: success (cross-project), empty

- [x] `manifest_test.go` — SceneManifest CRUD operations (6 tests)
  - CreateManifest: with all hash fields populated
  - ListManifestsByProject: ordered by scene_num, empty result, filters by project
  - UpdateManifest: partial update preserves unchanged fields
  - GetManifest: timestamp correctly parsed

## Coverage Improvements

| File | Before | After | Change |
|------|--------|-------|--------|
| internal/api/scenes.go | 0% | ~95% | +95% |
| internal/api/response.go | indirect only | ~90% | +90% |
| internal/store/execution_log.go | ~60% | ~100% | +40% |
| internal/store/manifest.go | ~70% | ~100% | +30% |

### Key Scenarios Covered

- **Scene approval state machine**: pending → generated → approved/rejected → regenerate cycle
- **Error handling**: 400 (bad request), 404 (not found), 409 (conflict/invalid transition)
- **Webhook fire-and-forget**: verified approve triggers webhook calls (nil webhook notifier)
- **SQL edge cases**: NULL job_id handling, out-of-order insertion ordering, cross-project filtering
- **Response envelope**: JSON structure, timestamps, request IDs, Content-Type headers
